recapPrompt.prompt: Which clue is the strongest sign that binary search might work?

choices.label: The data is sorted or ordered
choices.feedback: Correct. Sorted order is what makes the middle useful.

choices.label: The values are random
choices.feedback: Not this one. Random order gives the middle no safe clue.

reflectionPrompt.prompt: Explain how first occurrence and last occurrence change the normal binary-search loop.
